contact_detail.professional_title: Business Analyst with Java Backend Learning Track

additional_profile_info.skills: Business analysis, BPMN, user stories, acceptance criteria, SQL, Power BI, Java basics, REST API understanding, Git, Docker basics
additional_profile_info.professional_aspirations: Develop as a business/system analyst with strong technical understanding and later transition toward backend engineering.
additional_profile_info.achievements: Prepared structured documentation for multiple public-sector digital cases and improved requirement clarity for development teams.
additional_profile_info.general_information: Interested in business analysis, systems thinking, AI-assisted workflows, Java backend and Vue frontend integration.

work_experience.description: Worked on public-sector digital services, gathered requirements, prepared STP/technical specification artifacts, BPMN diagrams, ERD drafts, user stories, acceptance criteria, and coordinated with developers and stakeholders.
Supported operational workflows, reports, document coordination, and communication between internal teams and external stakeholders.
Translated technical, business, and operational documents between English and Russian with focus on clarity, terminology consistency, and stakeholder communication.

description.ru: Текущая степень с фокусом на разработке ПО, базах данных и информационных системах.
description.en: Current degree focused on software development, databases, and information systems.

description.ru: Обучение с фокусом на логистике, операциях и транспортных системах.
description.en: Focused on logistics, operations and transport systems.

projects.description: Designed and prototyped an AI-assisted resume generation system with structured profile data, prompt builder, review flow and PDF export concept.
Prepared structured artifacts for multiple public-sector digital cases, including BPMN, ERD, user stories and acceptance criteria.
